glosses.ja: 感動させる; 柔らかくする

sentences.target: Ce chiot attendrit tout le monde.

translations.fr: Ce chiot attendrit tout le monde.
translations.de: Dieser Welpe lässt alle Herzen schmelzen.
translations.zh-Hans: 这只小狗融化了所有人的心。
translations.yue: 呢隻小狗融化晒大家嘅心。
translations.pt: Este filhote derrete o coração de todos.
translations.he: הגור הזה ממיס לכולם את הלב.
translations.tr: Bu yavru köpek herkesin kalbini eritiyor.
translations.vi: Chú cún này làm tan chảy trái tim của mọi người.
translations.nl: Deze puppy laat ieders hart smelten.
translations.hu: Ez a kiskutya mindenki szívét megolvasztja.
translations.hi: यह पिल्ला सबका दिल पिघला देता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το κουτάβι λιώνει τις καρδιές όλων.
translations.id: Anak anjing ini melelehkan hati semua orang.
translations.sv: Den här valpen får allas hjärtan att smälta.
translations.da: Denne hvalp får alles hjerter til at smelte.
translations.ja: この子犬はみんなの心をとろけさせる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'chiot' to pick out a specific puppy; forms the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb meaning 'to move emotionally/to soften', takes 'tout le monde' as direct object.
Quantifying determiner of totality; here masculine singular in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' meaning 'everyone'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'monde'.
Common noun, masculine singular; in the idiom 'tout le monde' functions as the direct object meaning 'everyone'.

sentences.target: Ça m'attendrit de te voir là.

translations.fr: Ça m'attendrit de te voir là.
translations.en: It warms my heart to see you here.
translations.de: Es wärmt mir das Herz, dich hier zu sehen.
translations.ko: 여기 있는 너를 보니 마음이 따뜻해져요.
translations.zh-Hans: 看到你在这里让我心里一暖。
translations.ru: Мне тепло на душе, когда вижу тебя здесь.
translations.pt: Aquece meu coração ver você aqui.
translations.he: מחמם לי את הלב לראות אותך כאן.
translations.vi: Thấy bạn ở đây làm ấm lòng tôi.
translations.nl: Het verwarmt mijn hart om je hier te zien.
translations.uk: Мені теплішає на серці, коли бачу тебе тут.
translations.hu: Melengeti a szívemet, hogy itt látlak.
translations.hi: तुम्हें यहाँ देखकर मेरा दिल खुश हो जाता है.
translations.pl: Rozgrzewa mi serce, gdy widzę cię tutaj.
translations.el: Μου ζεσταίνει την καρδιά να σε βλέπω εδώ.
translations.nb: Det varmer hjertet mitt å se deg her.
translations.id: Melihatmu di sini menghangatkan hati saya.
translations.sv: Det värmer mitt hjärta att se dig här.
translations.ro: Îmi încălzește inima să te văd aici.
translations.cs: Zahřeje mě u srdce, když tě tady vidím.
translations.da: Det varmer mit hjerte at se dig her.
translations.ja: ここであなたに会えて心が温まる。

tokens.explanation: Deictic pronoun (informal), subject of the clause.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular, placed before the verb; direct object of 'attendrit'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting the clitic 'm'' as its object.
Preposition introducing an infinitival clause ('de + infinitif') expressing the cause/reason of the emotion.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; direct object of the infinitive 'voir'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'de'; takes 'te' as its object.
Deictic adverb of place; modifies the infinitival clause by indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu attendris le public avec ton histoire.
sentences.reading: /ty atɑ̃dʁi lə pyblik avɛk tɔ̃ nistwaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu attendris le public avec ton histoire.
translations.ipa: /ty atɑ̃dʁi lə pyblik avɛk tɔ̃ nistwaʁ/
translations.en: You move the audience with your story.
translations.es: Emocionas al público con tu historia.
translations.de: Du rührst das Publikum mit deiner Geschichte.
translations.it: Commuovi il pubblico con la tua storia.
translations.pt: Você emociona o público com a sua história.
translations.vi: Bạn làm khán giả xúc động với câu chuyện của mình.
translations.nl: Je raakt het publiek met je verhaal.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी कहानी से दर्शकों को भावुक कर देते हो.
translations.el: Συγκινείς το κοινό με την ιστορία σου.
translations.nb: Du rører publikum med historien din.
translations.id: Kamu menyentuh hati penonton dengan ceritamu.
translations.sv: Du berör publiken med din berättelse.
translations.da: Du rører publikum med din historie.
translations.ja: あなたは自分の物語で観客を感動させる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking 'le public' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'public'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'attendris'.
Preposition marking means/instrument; introduces the PP complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; used before vowel-initial feminine noun for euphony ('ton histoire' instead of 'ta histoire').
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: On veut attendrir la viande avant la cuisson.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vø atɑ̃dʁiʁ la vjɑ̃d avɑ̃ la kɥisɔ̃/

translations.fr: On veut attendrir la viande avant la cuisson.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vø atɑ̃dʁiʁ la vjɑ̃d avɑ̃ la kɥisɔ̃/
translations.en: We want to tenderize the meat before cooking.
translations.es: Queremos ablandar la carne antes de cocinarla.
translations.de: Wir wollen das Fleisch vor dem Kochen zart machen.
translations.it: Vogliamo intenerire la carne prima di cuocerla.
translations.ko: 우리는 요리하기 전에 고기를 연하게 만들고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想在烹饪前把肉拍松。
translations.yue: 我哋想喺煮之前將啲肉拍鬆。
translations.ru: Мы хотим размягчить мясо перед приготовлением.
translations.pt: Queremos amaciar a carne antes de cozinhar.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לרכך את הבשר לפני הבישול.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn làm mềm thịt trước khi nấu.
translations.nl: We willen het vlees mals maken voor het koken.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо розм'якшити м'ясо перед приготуванням.
translations.hu: Meg akarjuk puhítani a húst főzés előtt.
translations.hi: हम पकाने से पहले मांस को नरम करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να μαλακώσουμε το κρέας πριν το μαγείρεμα.
translations.nb: Vi vil mørne kjøttet før det tilberedes.
translations.id: Kami ingin melunakkan daging sebelum dimasak.
translations.sv: Vi vill möra köttet före tillagning.
translations.ro: Vrem să frăgezim carnea înainte de gătit.
translations.da: Vi vil mørne kødet før tilberedning.
translations.ja: 調理の前に肉を柔らかくしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; colloquial generic subject often equivalent to 'we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; modal/volitional verb selecting an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'veut'; here denotes physical tenderizing (of meat).
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'viande'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'attendrir'.
Preposition expressing temporal precedence; introduces the PP 'la cuisson'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'cuisson'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avant'.

You move the audience with your story.
We want to tenderize the meat before cooking.
